last_action: Implemented 'Download QR Code' button and improved Flex Message for entry payments, including account name display and cash payment notice.
summary: Phase 14: UX Optimization & Scalability. Implemented pagination for Lease Management and Tenant History tables. Optimized the Tenant Bill view for mobile devices. Enhanced the Entry Payment Flex Message by removing the owner's name for privacy, adding clear PromptPay account name display, and implementing a 'Download QR Code' button for better usability. Added a cash payment notice as an alternative option. Refined the Tenant Approval flow with immediate visual feedback and fixed calculation bugs for multi-room approvals.
next_steps: Conduct a full end-to-end test of the pro-rata billing cycle with actual meter readings.
Implement a CSV/PDF export feature for the Tenant History and Settlement records.
Enhance the Admin Dashboard with more detailed financial analytics and revenue charts.
